channel.title: RVA Figure Drawing
channel.description: Figure drawing sessions in Richmond, VA

item.title: Sun, Jun 14 · 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM — Figure Drawing Open Session - June 14, 2026
item.description: Location: Art Works Inc, 320 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $12.51 | Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

item.title: Wed, Jun 17 · 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM — June Queer Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Gold Lion Community Cafe, 1012 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: Donation | Chill vibe life drawing session celebrating queer bodies and creativity. All skill levels welcome. Suggested donation $10 pay now or at the door.

item.title: Wed, Jun 24 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — 18+ Figure Drawing: June Session
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10 | Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. Short pose session with a single model. Tickets required, no door sales. Must show valid photo ID.

item.title: Thu, Jun 25 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure drawing open studio with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+.

item.title: Mon, Jul 13 · 10:00 AM – 5:30 PM — The Alchemy Of Expression - Portrait Sculpture Workshop
item.description: Location: Manchester Studios RVA, 1300 West Main Street, Richmond, Virginia 23220 | Cost: $1600 | Two-week portrait sculpture workshop (July 13-17 and July 20-24, 2026). Classical Realism methods working from a live model. Covers skull, muscles, anatomy, facial fat pads, and likeness development. Hours: 10am-1pm and 2:30-5:30pm daily. All materials and model fees included. All skill levels welcome. Register via Zelle to ConstanceBowden@yahoo.com.

item.title: Wed, Jul 29 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Drawn to Life: A Crash Course on Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10 | All-ages crash course on life drawing. Presentation on drawing from life followed by a guided figure drawing session with a live clothed model. Hosted by resident tattoo artist Liam Williams.

item.title: Thu, Jul 30 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure drawing open studio with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+.

item.title: Thu, Aug 27 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure drawing open studio with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+.

item.title: Thu, Sep 24 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure drawing open studio with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+.

item.title: Thu, Oct 29 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure drawing open studio with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+.

item.title: Thu, Nov 26 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Figure drawing open studio with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Bring your own drawing materials—tables and chairs provided. Ages 18+.
